message:
✨ Add Reset to Defaults for Workloads, Storage, Network dashboards

- Add isCardsCustomized() function to track customization state
- Add handleResetToDefaults callback to reset cards to defaults
- Wire up FloatingDashboardActions with reset functionality
- Mark cards as customized when saved to localStorage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
